This kernel appears to be a synthetic/hand-crafted microbenchmark rather than something from a known tutorial, benchmark suite, or public codebase. The specific characteristics — the magic constants (17, 4095, 257, 8), the bitwise-AND masking for wrapping, the arbitrary multiply-accumulate loop with 1.1f — look like someone constructed this to test specific memory access patterns or arithmetic throughput, possibly to explore cache behavior or latency hiding.
